10 Spring Dress Trends to Shop in 2025

Vogue's Favorite Dress Trends:

An overview of the season's most important dresses.

The Butter Yellow Dress

Butter yellow has quickly become a runway staple across spring and summer collections.

The Drop Waist Dress

Drop-waist dresses elongate the silhouette and pair easily with minimalist flats.

They deliver an unfussy but directional spring shape.

The Polka-Dot Dress

Polka dots return with semi-sheer, draped, and strapless shapes that feel modern again.

Fashion-Forward Florals

Floral dresses show up with unexpected silhouettes and styling that breaks from tradition.

Shop More Dresses From Vogue Shopping
